6. Consider the commercial real estate company: The most likely commercial real estate company in this context is the New York Yankees' stadium, Yankee Stadium, which is located in New York City.
7. Conclude the answer: Timothy J. Leiweke was the former president and CEO of the New York Yankees, a professional sports team based in New York City.
